ddls:
CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "version_number" REAL /* Version number of the software */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "version_remarks" TEXT /* Remarks or notes about the version */,
  "superceded_by_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version that supersedes this version */,
  "supercedes_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version this version supersedes */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was released */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date and time the version expires */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_supercedes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("supercedes_version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_superceded_by_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("superceded_by_version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_notes" (
  "note_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release note */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the note belongs to */,
  "note_text" TEXT /* Text content of the release note */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the note was last updated */,
  "note_type" TEXT /* Type of release note (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("note_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_notes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, tester, project manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the version */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_result" TEXT /* Result of the access (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "change_logs" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the change was made to */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., major, minor, patch) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_change_logs_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dependencies" (
  "dependency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dependency */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version that depends on another version or component */,
  "dependent_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version or component being depended on */,
  "dependency_type" TEXT /* Type of dependency (e.g., software, library) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dependency */,
  "dependency_status" TEXT /* Status of the dependency (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dependency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dependencies_dependent_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependent_version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_results" (
  "test_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test result */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version being tested */,
  "test_name" TEXT /* Name of the test */,
  "test_result" TEXT /* Result of the test (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "test_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the test was conducted */,
  "tested_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who conducted the test */,
  "test_environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the test was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_tested_by FOREIGN KEY ("tested_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_results_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bug_reports" (
  "bug_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bug report */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the bug was found in */,
  "bug_description" TEXT /* Description of the bug */,
  "reported_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who reported the bug */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the bug was reported */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the bug (e.g., open, closed, in progress) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the bug (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bug_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_reported_by FOREIGN KEY ("reported_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bug_reports_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changelog_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the change category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "changelog_categories_mapping" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category mapping */,
  "change_id" INTEGER /* ID of the change being mapped */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category the change belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changelog_categories_mapping_change_id FOREIGN KEY ("change_id") REFERENCES change_logs ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_changelog_categories_mapping_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES changelog_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_metrics_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_calendar" (
  "calendar_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calendar entry */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the calendar entry belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the actual release */,
  "target_date" TEXT /* Target date and time for the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calendar_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_calendar_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the role belongs to */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version the comment belongs to */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text content of the comment */,
  "commented_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the comment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_comments_commented_by FOREIGN KEY ("commented_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_comments_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES versions ("version_id")
)
